test_name: Role and Permission Management for Test Resources
description: This scenario tests the ability to assign and manage roles and permissions for different users accessing the test resources.
steps: Navigate to the RoostGPT Test Dashboard.
Select a user to assign or modify roles.
Review current roles and permissions assigned to the user.
Modify the roles and permissions as per the requirements.
Save the changes and verify the update.
Log in as the user to verify access permissions.
Test restricted and unrestricted access to test resources.
Log out and repeat the process to assign roles to another user.
Verify that changes are reflected in user access logs.
expected_results: Roles and permissions are assigned successfully.
User access is restricted or unrestricted based on roles.
Changes are reflected in access logs.
edge_cases: Incorrect role assignment leads to unauthorized access.
System failure during role update process.
User permissions are not updated correctly in logs.
Role conflicts with existing user permissions.
api_interactions: Monitor API calls for role and permission updates.
Log changes in user access and permissions.
Verify API responses for successful role assignments.
performance_metrics: Measure time taken to update user roles.
Evaluate system performance during role management.
Analyze response time for permission checks.
accessibility_requirements: Ensure user management interface is keyboard accessible.
Verify screen readers announce role changes.
Check for color contrast compliance in user management UI.
